sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set Amt2 = Amt1, Flex2 = 'Ceded' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Assumed' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat >= '20' and BusCat <= '29'
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Assumed' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '13%'
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Direct' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '10'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update t set ReinName = c.CedingCo from TransX t inner join CedingCoByQtrContractUWYR c on t.Co = c.Co and t.Contract = c.Contract and t.UWYR = c.UWYR where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and c.Yr = '[Yr]' and c.Per = '[Mo]'

update t set Flex1 = c.Name, Division = c.FFH_Aff, Zone = c.ORH_Aff, Region = c.AMBest_Rating, Location = c.SP_Rating from TransX t inner join CedingCoByQtr c on t.ReinName = c.CedingCo where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and c.Yr = '[Yr]' and c.Per = '[Mo]'
update TransX set Amt1 = -Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,1) = '2' and not (Flex2 = 'Ceded' and substring(GL,1,2) = '28')
update TransX set Amt1 = -Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ((substring(GL,1,1) = '4' and Flex2 <> 'Ceded') or (substring(GL,1,1) = '5' and Flex1 = 'Ceded'))
update TransX set Flex3 = '1-WP' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('40')
update TransX set Flex3 = '2-UPR' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('15','21')
update TransX set Flex3 = '3-Case Resv' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('141','142','144','201','202','204')
update TransX set Flex3 = '4-IBNR' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('143','203')
update TransX set Flex3 = '5-Loss Pay' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('50','51')
update TransX set Flex3 = '6-AF Pay' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('28')
update TransX set Flex3 = '8-Est A/R' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '131%01'
update TransX set Flex3 = '7-Reg A/R' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '13%' and Flex3 is NULL
update TransX set Flex3 = '9-FH' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('16','24')
update t set Flex1 = b.Name from TransX t inner join Brokers b on t.ReinName = b.Broker where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Flex1,'') = ''

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, ReinName, BusCat, Contract, uwyr,Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
